name: Quiche Nicoise
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Tomatoes - peeled, seeded and diced
Herbes de Provence (Equal parts marjoram, oregano, thyme)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté onion in olive oil until softened.
2. Add garlic and sauté another 2 minutes.
3. Add diced tomatoes and 1/2 teaspoon herbes de Provence. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Uncover and simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
5. Remove from heat. Beat eggs with anchovies, add olive oil, tomato paste, parsley, paprika, and cayenne pepper.
6. Pour mixture into prepared shell.
7. Top with olives, grated cheese, and a little olive oil.
